profile.title: My profile

profile.tryAgainSoon: Please try again in a minute.
profile.unresolvedFavorites: Some favorite exercises ({{count}}) are currently unavailable due to API limits.

delete.confirm: This will permanently delete your account and saved profile data from data base. Continue?
delete.passwordPrompt: Enter your current password to confirm account deletion.

errors.requiresRecentLogin: Please log out and log back in, then try deleting the account again.
errors.deleteFailed: Account deletion failed. Please try again.

auth.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.verificationSentOnRegister: Verification email sent. Please verify your email before logging in.

errors.googleLoginFailed: Google login failed. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.userNotFound: No user found for this email.
errors.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email first to reset password.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.resetPasswordFailed: Could not send password reset email. Please try again.

edit.newPhotoSelected: A new profile photo has been selected.

errors.onlyImage: You can only choose an image for your profile photo.
errors.maxImageSize: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.

errors.canvasUnavailable: Image preview is not supported in this browser.

errors.imageTooLargeAfterCompression: Image is still too large. Choose a smaller image or screenshot.
errors.saveFailed: Saving changes failed. Please try again.

detail.chooseDayHelp: Choose a day for this exercise.
detail.description: Exercises keep you strong. {{name}} is one of the best exercises to target your {{target}}. It will help you improve your mood and gain energy.

dynamicDescriptions.0: {{name}} focuses on your {{target}} and is a great choice when you want steady progress with controlled form.
dynamicDescriptions.1: Use {{name}} to challenge your {{target}} while building consistency. Keep your tempo smooth and your reps clean.
dynamicDescriptions.2: {{name}} combines {{equipment}} work with focused {{target}} activation, making it useful for balanced strength sessions.
dynamicDescriptions.3: For {{bodyPart}} development, {{name}} is a reliable option. Stay strict with technique and increase difficulty gradually.

similarExercises.exercisesSameEquipment: Exercises that use the same equipment
